# MOOT System

MOOT System provides storage, queueing, sync, and telemetry services for MOOTx01 Framework libraries.

Status: scaffolded public venue. Package source will be loaded by the
MOOTx01 library publisher from the canonical source tree.

## What This Repository Is

This repository is an Apache-2.0 published library venue for the MOOTx01
Framework. It is generated from the canonical MOOTx01 product tree and is
intended to become a boring install surface for Swift, Rust, and optional
binary/FFI consumers.

## Packages To Be Loaded

- `packages/kits/PersistenceKit`
- `packages/kits/QueueKit`
- `packages/kits/ConvergenceKit`
- `packages/libs/ObserverSink`
- `packages/libs/LoopbackHTTP`

## Installation

The install snippets will become active after the first source load.

SwiftPM:

```swift
.package(url: "https://github.com/codedaptive/moot-system.git", from: "0.1.0")
```

Cargo:

```toml
# Crates are published after the GitHub source venue is loaded.
```

## Brand

MOOTx01 is a registered trademark. Use `MOOTx01 Approved` only for artifacts
that pass the published conformance and release gates. Independent work that has
not passed those gates should use `compatible with MOOTx01 technology`.
